reviews.review_msg: Great class, brilliant prof. Learned a lot about new trends in the movie industry. Whole class gave TA and prof a round of applause at the end of semester. Highly recommend!

Terrible prof. Couldn't be less engaging. Seems like she doesn't care if people listen or not. She shows up. reads us her terrible looking powerpoint slides. Doesn't ask questions. Awful experience over all. Avoid.

Took a course with her at Carleton University and it was simply dreadful. Assigned so many things that students couldn't possibly keep up. Monotone and packs way too much information into a lecture. Extremely hard marker. Only improvement seems to be that she now posts her slides on WebCT, which is more than what the previous poster wrote.

Doris has very controversial teaching methods. She has ppt notes but refuses to send them out b/c, as she says, "the pictures are mine and I do not want them out." Students have resorted to taking digital pictures of slides in lecture b/c she goes too fast. Finally, she's monotone. I've fallen asleep several times. AVOID HER IF YOU CAN!
